Name: FWindowStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SWindow

Variables.Name: MinimizeButtonStyle
Variables.Description: Style used to draw the window minimize button

Variables.Name: MaximizeButtonStyle
Variables.Description: Style used to draw the window maximize button

Variables.Name: RestoreButtonStyle
Variables.Description: Style used to draw the window restore button

Variables.Name: CloseButtonStyle
Variables.Description: Style used to draw the window close button

Variables.Name: TitleTextStyle
Variables.Description: Style used to draw the window title text

Variables.Name: ActiveTitleBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the window title area when the window is active

Variables.Name: InactiveTitleBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the window title area when the window is inactive

Variables.Name: FlashTitleBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the window title area when the window is flashing

Variables.Name: BackgroundColor
Variables.Description: Color used to draw the window background

Variables.Name: OutlineBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the window outline

Variables.Name: OutlineColor
Variables.Description: Color used to draw the window outline

Variables.Name: BorderBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the window border

Variables.Name: BackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the window background

Variables.Name: ChildBackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the background of child windows
